name_cn:
Large. #Dark Green
🆕FENDI First is here!!
- Large M80019 size 32.5x15x23.5cm
- Small M80018 size 26x9.5x18cm
Designed by Kim Jones, the first FENDI 1, overturning previous bag shapes. The metal trim and large logo lock, combined with the body design, integrates architectural deconstruction with fashion. Elegant yet cool, instantly eye-catching! Perfect for clutching at evening events, and gives a high-end street chic vibe when worn crossbody!
